name: Freqtrade (Crypto Trading Bot Framework)

auth.notes: Exchange API keys; REST API with JWT auth; Telegram bot integration

performance.notes: Exchange-dependent; 1min candle polling typical; WebSocket for tick data

agent_readiness.notes: Full-featured crypto trading bot framework. Strategy class with populate_indicators(), populate_entry_trend(), populate_exit_trend(). Backtesting: freqtrade backtesting --strategy MyStrategy. Hyperopt for strategy optimization. CCXT for exchange connectivity (100+ exchanges). Dry run mode. Telegram bot for mobile control. REST API for programmatic control. Docker deployment. Plot candles with indicators. Databse: SQLite for trades. Integrated with TA-Lib and pandas-ta.

gotchas: GPL-3.0 license may affect commercial strategy distribution
Complex configuration (config.json, strategy class, exchange setup)
Backtesting results can be optimistic without walk-forward validation
Exchange API key management requires careful security practices
best_when: Automated crypto trading bot with backtesting and live trading
Rapid strategy prototyping with built-in hyperopt optimization
Dry-run paper trading before deploying real capital
Multi-exchange crypto strategy deployment via CCXT
avoid_when: When GPL license incompatible with commercial use
summary: Freqtrade is a full-featured open-source crypto trading bot with backtesting, hyperopt optimization, and live trading via CCXT (100+ exchanges). Strategy class: populate_indicators(), populate_entry_trend(), populate_exit_trend(). Docker deployment. Telegram control. REST API. Dry-run mode for paper trading. Built-in integration with TA-Lib and pandas-ta for technical indicators.
